calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Content planning
calendar.noTagsAvailable: You have no tags yet. Create them in Settings → Labels.
calendar.noInternalTags: No more tags. Create a new one.
calendar.noPublishedPlatforms: This post has not been published yet.
calendar.instagramRequiresMedia: Instagram requires a photo or video
calendar.tiktokPrivacyHint: Choose who can see the video after it is published to TikTok.
calendar.tiktokPrivateOnlyNotice: In this TikTok mode, only private posts are allowed. The video will be published as “Only me”.
calendar.tiktokSandboxPrivateOnlyError: For an unaudited TikTok app, posting is allowed only to private accounts. Setting the post to 'Only me' is not enough - the TikTok account itself must be private at the time of publishing.
calendar.remoteEditSuccess: Text has been updated in Postio and on the social network.
calendar.photoChangeNotAllowed: Changing a photo on a published post is not possible. You must republish the post to change the photo.
calendar.onlyTextUpdatePossible: For published posts, only text can be changed. To change a photo, you must delete and recreate the post.
calendar.igEditNotSupported: Instagram does not allow editing the text of already published posts. If you want to change the text, you must delete the post in Postio and publish it again.
calendar.twEditNotSupported: X (Twitter) does not support editing posts via API. If you want to change the text, you must delete the post and publish it again.
calendar.ttEditNotSupported: TikTok does not support editing or deleting posts after publishing.
calendar.saveMetadataTooltip: Saves only internal metadata (internal tags, inline hashtags, location). The text and media on social networks stay unchanged.
calendar.metadataOnlyHint: The post text is unchanged – only internal metadata is saved; nothing is re-published.
calendar.newPostHint: To save a post, you must enter text and pick at least one platform. Internal tags are saved together with the post.
calendar.fileTooLargeVideo: File is too large. Max limit for videos is 20MB.
calendar.optimizingImage: File is too large (over 5 MB). Postio is now automatically optimizing it for social networks...
calendar.compressionError: Could not optimize the image, uploading the original file.
calendar.invalidFileType: Unsupported file format (jpg, png, webp, mp4, mov)
calendar.unsupportedFormat: Format {type} is not supported. Please use JPG, PNG, WEBP or MP4/MOV.
calendar.videoTooLarge: Video is too large (max 50 MB). Please reduce its size.
calendar.videoLowResolution: Video has a low resolution (less than 640px). It may look blurry on social networks.
calendar.instagramVideoTooSmall: This video cannot be published on Instagram.
calendar.instagramVideoTooSmallHint: Instagram does not support videos with low resolution (minimum 640 × 1138 px). Please regenerate the video at a higher resolution (recommended 1080 × 1920 px).
calendar.toastDeleteFromAppSuccess: Post was deleted from the app. Delete it manually on some networks.
calendar.toastRemoveUnexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred while deleting.
calendar.toastKeptAsDraft: Post was kept as a draft.
calendar.toastPermanentlyDeleted: Post was permanently deleted from the app.
calendar.toastSmartDeleteError: An error occurred during smart delete.
calendar.toastApiNotSupported: {platform} does not support deletion via API. Delete the post manually on {platform}.
calendar.bulkDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected post(s)? This will remove them from Postio.
calendar.toastLinkedInArchivedMulti: Post was removed from {count} platform(s). LinkedIn stays in Postio as archived (grey icon) – delete it manually on LinkedIn.
calendar.toastLinkedInArchivedSingle: LinkedIn stays in Postio as archived (grey icon) – delete it manually on LinkedIn.
calendar.toastArchivedReminder: Post stays in Postio with greyed-out icons for {platforms} – delete manually on those platforms.
calendar.removedExternallyBannerDesc: Post was removed from the platform. You can safely delete it from the app using "Smart Delete" (🗑).

connectModal.title: Connect [platform]

connectModal.warningDesc: This feature requires a Professional account (Business/Creator) or a Facebook Page.
connectModal.warningDescInstagram: This feature requires a Professional account (Business/Creator).
connectModal.warningDescLinkedIn: LinkedIn tokens expire in 60 days. You will need to reconnect after expiry.
connectModal.warningDescYouTube: You will be redirected to Google to grant Postio access to your YouTube channel (videos and basic profile). We keep your tokens safe and refresh them automatically.
connectModal.warningDescX: X (Twitter) does not support editing tweets via API. Published tweets cannot be edited – they can only be deleted.
connectModal.warningDescTikTok: You will be redirected to TikTok to grant Postio access to your account (video publishing and profile). Tokens expire in 15 days and are refreshed automatically.
connectModal.learnMore: Have a personal account? Learn how to switch
connectModal.connectAnotherHint: Connect another account to add a new profile of the same network.

settings.title: Settings
settings.profileDescription: Manage your personal information and preferences.
settings.dangerZoneDesc: Deleting your account is irreversible. All your data will be permanently removed.
settings.referralsDescription: Invite friends and earn free months of PRO.
settings.preferencesDescription: Set your timezone, time format, and other preferences.
settings.timezoneDescription: Used as the default timezone for new connected channels and for sending email notifications. Also used for calculating your posting streaks.
settings.timeFormatDescription: Set the time format for the Calendar and Queue.
settings.startOfWEEKDescription: Set the first day of the week for the Calendar, date picker, and your posting streaks.
settings.defaultPostingActionDescription: Set a default time to post for the composer. We will use it whenever the composer is triggered without a specific time.
settings.photoDescription: Choose a photo that is at least 180x180 pixels in size.
settings.twoFactorAuthDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account. You'll need an authentication code from an app like Google Authenticator when logging in.
settings.setup2FAStep1: 1. Open Google Authenticator or a similar app
settings.setup2FAStep2: 2. Scan the QR code or enter the secret code manually
settings.setup2FAStep3: 3. Enter the 6-digit code from the app to confirm
settings.qrCodeInstructions: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app
settings.recoveryCodesDescription: You can use these codes to log in if you lose access to your authenticator app. Save them in a secure place.
settings.recoveryCodesWarning: These codes will only be shown once!
settings.iHaveSavedCodes: I have saved my recovery codes
settings.queueScheduleDescription: Set the days and times when posts are automatically added to the publishing queue.

cookie.usesCookies: We use cookies to ensure you get the best experience on Postio.
cookie.preferencesIntro: Choose which types of cookies you would like to enable.
cookie.necessaryDesc: These cookies are essential for the website to function and cannot be switched off.
cookie.functionalDesc: These cookies allow us to remember your choices (e.g. language) for a better experience.
cookie.analyticsDesc: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the website.
cookie.advertisingDesc: These cookies are used to make advertising more relevant and less repetitive.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you use Postio.
privacy.dataWeCollectDesc: When you register and use our service, we collect data such as your name, email address, and service usage data.
privacy.howWeUseDesc: We use your data to provide, maintain, and improve our service, including personalizing your experience and communicating with you.
privacy.cookiesDesc: Information about how we use cookies can be found in our cookie management panel at the bottom of the screen. These files help us ensure security and the best user experience.
privacy.dataSharingDesc: We do not sell or rent your personal data to third parties. We share it only to provide the service or when required by law.
privacy.yourRightsDesc: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You may also withdraw your cookie consent at any time.
privacy.dataDeletionDesc: In Postio, you have full control over your data. If you wish to delete your account and all related data (including connected social accounts), you can do so directly in the app under Settings -> Danger Zone -> Delete Account. Alternatively, you can send a deletion request to postio.cz@gmail.com. Your data will be permanently removed from our servers within 30 days of your request.
privacy.contactDesc: If you have questions about this policy, contact us at

referrals.step2Desc: Send it to friends on social media or by email.
referrals.step3Desc: Your friends sign up through your link.
referrals.step4Desc: Earn one free month of PRO per referral.

inbox.comingSoon: Messages and comments from all your platforms in one place. We're preparing it for you – coming soon!

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Let's set up your profile in a few steps

onboarding.step3Message: Your profile is set up. You can now plan posts, connect accounts, and grow on social media.

tags.title: Tags
tags.emptySubtitle: Tags are visible to everyone in your organization.
tags.emptyDescription: No tags yet. Create tags to organize and categorize your social media content. Tags help you track campaigns and analyze the performance of your posts.
tags.tagNameExists: A tag with this name already exists
tags.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this tag? This action cannot be undone.
tags.infoBannerText: Tags are visible to everyone in your organization.
tags.infoDialogIntro: A short readme on what tags are, why they matter, and how to get the most out of them in Postio.
tags.infoDialogWhatBody: Tags are internal labels you attach to your posts. You create them yourself and name them after whatever matters to you – a campaign, an audience, a funnel stage, or a topic.
tags.infoDialogWhyItem1: Quick filtering – instantly find posts by category in Posts and Calendar.
tags.infoDialogWhyItem2: Better overview – see at a glance how many posts use each tag in the Labels list.
tags.infoDialogWhyItem3: Ready for analytics – tags will power your content performance breakdowns.
tags.infoDialogWhyItem4: Consistent team – if you collaborate, tags align how everyone labels content.
tags.infoDialogHowItem1: Create tags in Settings → Labels using the Create tag button.
tags.infoDialogHowItem2: Attach them to posts when creating or editing a post.
tags.infoDialogHowItem3: Filter Posts or Calendar by a specific tag.
tags.infoDialogHowItem4: Track post counts per tag in Settings → Labels.
tags.infoDialogVisibilityBody: Tags are an internal tool only. Your followers on social networks never see them – they help you organize content for yourself.

hero.title: Plan and publish posts across every network
hero.subtitle: A simple scheduler for content creators. Save time and publish across social networks at once.

socialProof.text: Join content creators. Secure login via official APIs.

benefits.heading: Everything you need to grow
benefits.aiVisionDesc: Generate and improve posts with artificial intelligence.
benefits.autoQueueDesc: Automatically schedule posts into the optimal publishing queue.
benefits.multiDesc: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X, TikTok and YouTube from one place.
benefits.analyticsDesc: Track post performance on a clear dashboard.

pricing.heading: Pricing that grows with you
pricing.subheading: Start free. Upgrade whenever you want.
pricing.creator: Creator

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.subheading: Everything you need to know before you start.

items.a: Yes. The Free plan is free forever and lets you connect 1 account and publish up to 10 posts per month. No credit card needed.
Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X (Twitter), TikTok and YouTube. You manage them all from one place.

items.q: What happens if I exceed the post limit?
items.a: On the Free plan you won't be able to publish more posts that month until the limit resets. Upgrading to Creator or Pro removes the limit.

items.q: Can I change my plan anytime?
items.a: Yes. You can move to a higher or lower plan whenever you want, and the change applies immediately.
Yes. Login and network access tokens are encrypted, stored securely, and refreshed regularly.

footer.newsletterDesc: Subscribe to updates on content creation, new features, and social media tips.
Subscribe for content creation news, new features and social media tips.
footer.tagline: Plan and publish social media content with AI.
footer.madeInCz: Made with ❤️ in the Czech Republic
